name: forgeplan-brownfield-pack
description: Brownfield migration pack for forgeplan — ingest existing docs (Obsidian, MADR, ad-hoc markdown) and C4/DDD/autoresearch analysis output into a structured forgeplan graph. Implements ADR-009 orchestrator model: composes existing marketplace plugins (c4-architecture, autoresearch, ddd-expert, feature-dev) via mapping YAMLs + playbook recipes. Ships c4-to-forge mapping validated at CL3 on Forgeplan repo.

cli.name: forgeplan
cli.reason: Requires playbook runtime (EPIC-007 PRD-065) and ingest engine (PRD-066)
